stratagem.name: ARMOUR OF CONTEMPT
stratagem.lore: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their post‑human physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagem.name: TACTICAL FORESIGHT
stratagem.lore: With the enemy’s countermeasures and responses predicted and allowed for in advance, the Ultramarines can weather their most ferocious attacks.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagem.name: COURAGE AND HONOUR!
stratagem.lore: Roaring their famed battle cry, the Ultramarines hurl themselves into the fight, striving all the harder to prevail beneath the unwavering eye of their Chapter Master.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

stratagem.name: ULTRAMARIAN ADAPTIVITY
stratagem.lore: No Chapter’s warriors know better the breadth – theoretical and practical – of the Codex Astartes’ teachings, and how these can and should be adapted to ensure victory.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
stratagem.effect: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for your unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine this battle.

stratagem.name: EXEMPLARY VIGILANCE
stratagem.lore: Long have the Ultramarines guarded both Ultramar and the wider Imperium. No foe can hide from their vengeful gaze or evade the reach of their wrath.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

stratagem.name: PRACTICAL TACTICS
stratagem.lore: After rapidly making a theoretical assessment of the foes’ probable next moves, the Ultramarines apply practical repositioning to counter them.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
stratagem.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.
